ZENON SYNTH
READY
KM: 0 / 1 0%
REM EXACTA: 1.0
FILTER
ENVELOPE
GLOBAL VOICE
ESCALA
MOD MATRIX
SOURCE → DEST :: AMOUNT
→
→
→
→
DELAY
REVERB
OUTPUT
ESCENA
PRESETS
EXPORT
SHORTCUTS
SPACEPlay / Pause RReset + / −Add / Remove runner FFullscreen MMute [ / ]Cambiar trayectoria 1 2 3Factory presets ⌘ZUndo ⌘⇧ZRedo ⌘SSave preset
